The '''Muurian transport''' was a [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] manufactured by [[Muurian Interstellar]].

==Characteristics==
The 30.5 meter long wedge-shaped freighter was designed to compete with [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|CEC's]] [[YT-series/Legends|YT-series]] and both designs had comparable speeds, which were fast for a freighter and able to match that of a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class shuttle]] or [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|Delta-class DX-9 transport]].

While it had a weaker hull and shields than a stock [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]], it had a heavier standard armament than the YT-1300 with two double [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]] turrets, three laser cannons, and two [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launchers.

==History==
Because of its armament and defenses, the Muurian transport was used as an assault ship by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], rogue [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]], and some [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] groups.
